prompt: Transform the map continents into colorful, textured puzzle pieces.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the dark blue world map continents in the center of the image. Make each continent appear as a unique, distinctly colored and textured puzzle piece. The continents should have visible interlocking edges, creating the impression of a jigsaw puzzle map.
objects: World map continents as unique, distinctly colored, textured puzzle pieces with interlocking edges
Circular data label for North America (60M North America)
Circular data label for Europe (51M Europe)
Circular data label for South America (40M South America)
Circular data label for Asia-Pacific (55M Asia-Pacific)
